name: NLC India Limited
summary: NLC India Limited operates an energy company in India. It operates in two segments, Lignite Mining and Power Generation. The company is involved in the generation of power through thermal, wind, and solar photo voltaic power plants. It operates five thermal power stations with an aggregate installed capacity of 3240 MW; and 34 wind turbine generators with capacity of 1.50 MW each, as well as commissioned 440 MW solar photo voltaic power plant in Neyveli. The company also mines for lignite. It operates three open cast lignite mines in Neyveli, State of Tamil Nadu; and one open cast lignite mine in Barsingsar, State of Rajasthan with a total capacity of 30.60 MTPA, as well as coal excavation from Talabira II and III coal opencast mines at Odisha with a mining capacity of 20.0 MTPA. The company sells its raw lignite to small scale industries for use it as fuel in their production activities. NLC India Limited was formerly known as Neyveli Lignite Corporation Limited and changed its name to NLC India Limited in April 2016. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Neyveli, India.
